description: Screenshot styled as a Wall Street Journal online article. At top a small blue 'ECONOMY' section kicker sits above the black serif headline 'Central U.S. Manufacturing Activity Accelerates'. A subhead in gray reads 'Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City says its Tenth District Manufacturing Survey's composite index climbed to 8 this month from 6 in October'. Below is a byline 'By Ed Frankl' with a blue 'Follow' button, timestamp 'Nov. 20, 2025 12:03 pm ET', and a row of WSJ interface controls (Share, Resize, Listen (1 min), and a three-dot menu). The lower half is a color photograph inside an industrial setting: a man in a maroon T-shirt and gray Nike cap, wearing a work glove, working on a large disassembled engine or transmission assembly suspended by a chain hoist; shelving with parts boxes (a red toolbox, a 'Z-03' bin label) is behind him on a factory floor. The tweet text includes 'THE TRUMP EFFECT'. No government seal is on the image.
notable_text: ECONOMY; Central U.S. Manufacturing Activity Accelerates; Tenth District Manufacturing Survey's composite index climbed to 8 this month from 6 in October; By Ed Frankl, Nov. 20, 2025
